name: Dewglimmer
personality: Dewglimmer moves at the exact speed of a well-tested software release — careful, consistent, wearing a beanie like it has nowhere particular to be. Its ◉ eyes catch the quiet bugs, the ones that only fail on Tuesdays, and it was already watching.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
